prompt: Describe a thunderstorm. No sentence may contain more than 5 words. Keep every sentence to 5 words or fewer.
response: Dark clouds gather above. The sky turns gray. Wind begins to howl. Trees sway and bend. Lightning cracks the sky. Thunder shakes the ground. Rain pours down hard. Puddles form on streets. Flashes illuminate the darkness. The air smells electric. Hail pelts the rooftops. Windows rattle and shake. Dogs whimper in fear. Children cover their ears. The storm rages on. Then silence slowly returns. Clouds begin to part. Sunlight peeks through again. The earth feels refreshed. Everything drips and glistens.
